values.description: Base URL for the running aegis-backend-test service (npm start)
Aegis Core API base URL — also used to fetch JWKS (/.well-known/jwks.json)
Country code for the M2M token endpoint: /api/v1/auth/{country}/token
Role required by /resource/admin. Must be present in the token's roles[] array.
AUTO-SET by 'Get Aegis M2M Token'. Paste here manually if needed.
